title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM D-VI-9, SPECIAL PROVISIONS FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS, PAGE NINETY-THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE HUNDRED TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2005 / OG No. 2, 599 (February, 1949)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 325, July 13, 1948 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM D-VI-9, SPECIAL PROVISIONS FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS, PAGE NINETY-THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE HUNDRED TWENTY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item D-VI-9, Special Provisions for the Department of Foreign Affairs, page 93 of Republic Act No. 320, is amended to read as follows:

"9. No lump sum appropriation authorized for the Department of Foreign Affairs may be used for increases of salaries nor for the creation of new positions except abroad."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect July 1, 1948.

Approved, July 13, 1948.
